note: Supplements, individual ingredients, and fruit variety for customization

foodRoutines.name: Daily Supplements (Fish Oil Only)
foodRoutines.instructions: Load this once per day. Fish Oil adds 45 cal, 5g fat to your daily total. Creatine and L-Carnitine have no calories.

supplements.name: Fish Oil (3 capsules)
supplements.instructions: Take with biggest meal (lunch) for better absorption. MUST track the fat!

supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate (5g)
supplements.instructions: Mix in water, take post-workout with breakfast/meal. Daily consistency matters more than timing.

supplements.name: L-Carnitine (2g)
supplements.instructions: Take 30-45 min before workout. Helps fat burning during training.

eggs.name: Whole Egg (1 large, 50g)
eggs.instructions: Use quantity multiplier: 3x for 3 eggs, 4x for 4 eggs

eggs.name: Egg White (1 large, 33g)
eggs.instructions: Pure protein, no fat. Use quantity multiplier: 2x for 2 whites

fruits.name: Kiwi (2 medium, 150g)
fruits.instructions: Can swap with apple in afternoon snack (Plan A) for variety

fruits.name: Mandarin (2 medium, 150g)
fruits.instructions: Can swap with apple in afternoon snack (Plan A) for variety

fruits.name: Seedless Grapes (1 cup, 150g)
fruits.instructions: Slightly higher carbs than apple/kiwi/mandarin. Good for workout days.

fruits.name: Apple (1 medium, 150g)
fruits.instructions: Current afternoon snack fruit in Plan A

fruits.name: Banana (1 small, 90g)
fruits.instructions: Pre-workout only! Best for quick energy before training.

howToUse: OPTION 1: Load the 'Daily Supplements' routine once per day
1. Go to Food tab → Click + Add Food
4. Creatine and L-Carnitine have 0 calories (optional to track)
1. Delete the loaded '4 Whole Eggs' from routine
4. Click + Add Food again → Type 'Egg White'
1. Delete the 'Apple' from your afternoon snack
2. Add whichever fruit you bought this week:

planA_morningWorkout.830am: Post-workout breakfast + Creatine (5g) mixed in water
planA_morningWorkout.330pm: Whey shake + YOUR CHOICE FRUIT + 12 almonds

planB_afternoonWorkout.245pm: Whey + dates + L-Carnitine (if not taken earlier)
planB_afternoonWorkout.515pm: Post-workout dinner + Creatine (5g) mixed in water

mondayBadminton.1200pm: Big lunch + Fish Oil (3 caps) + Creatine (5g)

importantNotes: ✅ Fish Oil adds 45 cal + 5g fat daily (MUST track this!)
✅ Rotate fruits for variety - all ~80-100 cal except grapes (104)
✅ Use individual egg items to customize breakfast portions
✅ Quantity multiplier works: 3x Whole Egg = 210 cal, 18p
